title: fagara latespinosa
intro: Fagara latespinosa, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fagara latespinosa include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce fever. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
